title: lycopodium socratis
intro: Lycopodium socratis, also known as Wolf's Bane or Spiny Club Moss, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Lycopodiaceae, characterized by its unique, branching stems and spiny leaves. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which make it effective in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds. The health benefits of Lycopodium socratis include its ability to relieve pain, reduce swelling, and promote digestion, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. Lycopodium socratis is often prepared as a tincture or infusion, and its active compounds, such as lycopodine and huperzine, are also used in modern herbal preparations.
